content:
🌟 NomAI-App | Dart
🎯 Primary Use Case: Personalized AI-powered nutrition tracking and meal analysis for healthier eating habits.
✨ Key Features: • Meal logging with detailed nutrition breakdowns • AI chat assistant for analysis, planning, and tips • Monthly analytics with charts and summary statistics • Personalization based on dietary preferences, allergies, and targets • Image recognition for faster meal logging
📖 Summary: NomAI is an open-source Flutter application designed for tracking meals and analyzing nutrition. It leverages AI to provide personalized guidance, making healthy eating more accessible and sustainable through features like quick logging, detailed analytics, and a conversational assistant.
🔗 Links: • View Project ================ 🔓 Open Source
